queries.question: Show films and novels released in 2020.
queries.sql:
SELECT EntertainmentItem.title 
FROM MediaType JOIN EntertainmentItem ON MediaType.id = EntertainmentItem.mediaTypeId
WHERE (MediaType.typeName = "Film" OR MediaType.typeName = "Novel") AND EntertainmentItem.releaseYear = 2020
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?title WHERE {
  ?mediatype a :MediaType .
  ?entertainmentitem a :EntertainmentItem .
  ?entertainmentitem p:hasMediaType ?mediatype .
  ?entertainmentitem p:title ?title .
  ?mediatype p:typeName ?typename_w .
  ?mediatype p:typeName ?typename_w2 .
  ?entertainmentitem p:releaseYear ?releaseyear_w .
  FILTER((((STR(?typename_w) = "Film" || STR(?typename_w2) = "Novel")) && (STR(?releaseyear_w) = "2020" || STR(?releaseyear_w) = "2020.0")))
}
